strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with strong full-stack and infrastructure expertise
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, a scalable open-source platform
concerns: Limited direct AI expertise or AI-powered product development experience in recent roles
No evidence of advanced degrees (MS/PhD) in AI-related fields
Minimal cloud platform strategy experience despite broad technical background
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical breadth and entrepreneurial initiative but lacks depth in AI-focused strategy and cloud platform development, which are critical for this role. While her recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, the absence of AI-powered product experience and advanced AI credentials raises concerns about the ability to drive strategic AI initiatives.
